programme.title: Straight A's
programme.desc: An addict (Ryan Phillippe) confronts an ex-lover (Anna Paquin) who is now married to his brother.

programme.title: Villains
programme.desc: Amateur criminals stumble upon a dark secret in a sadistic couple's home.

programme.title: Tragedy Girls
programme.desc: Two teenage crime reporters start murdering the locals to boost their social media stardom.

programme.title: Tragedy Girls
programme.desc: Two teenage crime reporters start murdering the locals to boost their social media stardom.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: A magician (Edward Norton) vies with the heir to the Austro-Hungarian Empire for a woman's love.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A woman's world unravels after her psychiatrist prescribes a new medication to treat her anxiety.

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a loft which five men share for extramarital trysts.

programme.title: The Stepfather
programme.desc: A young man (Penn Badgley) suspects that his mother's new lover (Dylan Walsh) is up to no good.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls
programme.desc: A sadistic phone caller terrorizes a teenage babysitter (Camilla Belle).

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: After a sexual encounter, a teen has the inescapable feeling that something is after her.

programme.title: The Haunting in Connecticut
programme.desc: A woman (Virginia Madsen) turns to a priest for help in ridding a new home of ghosts.

programme.title: Silent House
programme.desc: Panic turns to terror when a young woman becomes sealed inside her family's remote lake house.

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: Parents (Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Kyra Sedgwick) must save their daughter from an evil spirit.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A woman's world unravels after her psychiatrist prescribes a new medication to treat her anxiety.

programme.title: Last Straw
programme.desc: A waitress finds herself in a fight for survival against masked assailants at a roadside diner.

programme.title: Last Straw
programme.desc: A waitress finds herself in a fight for survival against masked assailants at a roadside diner.

programme.title: New Rose Hotel
programme.desc: Corporate raiders (Christopher Walken, Willem Dafoe) use a woman (Asia Argento) to lure a genius.

programme.title: The Immaculate Room
programme.desc: A couple compete for $5 million to last 50 days isolated in a room where dark secrets arise.

programme.title: All I See Is You
programme.desc: A man starts to feel insecure when an operation allows his blind wife to see out of her right eye.

programme.title: Silent House
programme.desc: Panic turns to terror when a young woman becomes sealed inside her family's remote lake house.

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: Parents (Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Kyra Sedgwick) must save their daughter from an evil spirit.
